title: lathyrus bolanderi subsp. quercetorum
intro: Lathyrus bolanderi subsp. quercetorum, also known as Quercus Canyon Pea or Quercetorum Pea, is a subspecies of the Lathyrus bolanderi plant, a legume native to the western United States. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a treatment for various gastrointestinal issues and as a diuretic. The health benefits of Lathyrus bolanderi subsp. quercetorum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and help lower blood pressure. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be extracted and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
